title: DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: BEAVERCREEK HEALTH CENTER DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general dentistry services, including emergency care, cleaning, sealants, fluoride treatments and supplements, information on proper care, consultation, and referrals. 110 Beavercreek Road Suite 100 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Friday 8am-5pm, Tuesday-Thursday 8am-7pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts the following insurance plans for comprehensive care: OpenCard, CareOregon Dental, ODS Dental-Unassigned. Also offers sliding scale fees based on household income and size. A minimum of $40 is required at time of visit and will be applied to the bill. Accepts uninsured patients for urgent services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the intersection of Beavercreek Road and Warner Milne Road TriMet bus line 33 Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Emergency Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEAVERCREEK HEALTH CENTER
